app.title: Apple TV Remote
app.subtitle: Control Apple TV on your local network

backend.unreachable: Cannot reach the backend. In the <folder>backend</folder> folder, run: <cmd>uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765</cmd>

actions.tvPowerAria: Turn Apple TV on or off

playing.unavailable: Playback info isn’t available. Pairing must be complete; on tvOS 15+ the media protocol (AirPlay / MRP tunnel) is usually required.
playing.fetchFailed: Could not read playback state from the device.

card.noSelectionHint: Tap Scan, then choose an Apple TV to control
card.titleDpad: Tap: click · Hold: press and hold
card.titleBack: Tap: Back · Hold: press and hold
card.titleHome: Tap: Home · Hold: press and hold Home

pair.description: On tvOS 15+, the remote relies heavily on Companion. If only AirPlay was paired, Select may not work. Now playing needs AirPlay (or MRP) credentials too—if Companion is already saved, start pairing again and you should be prompted for the missing protocol (often AirPlay).
pair.pinHint: Enter the PIN shown on your TV below, then tap Submit and finish.
pair.finishHint: After entering the PIN on the TV, tap Finish pairing below.

toast.noDevicesDesc: Make sure your Apple TV is on the same network as this computer and awake.
